title: maclura mollis
intro: Maclura mollis, also known as the paper mulberry, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to Southeast Asia. Its medicinal properties include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and inflammation. The health benefits of Maclura mollis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Maclura mollis can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
